problem: What neural connectivity differences cause autism spectrum characteristics?
hypothesis: If Dopamine/serotonin reuptake inhibition with specificity is applied to autism, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 23 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
